title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 03 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 03 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 03 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 03/02/2026
Today, the DCE iron ore market extended its volatile and weak trend. The benchmark contract, I2605, closed at777.5 RMB/tonne, representing a decline of 1.14% from the previous trading day. In the physical market, spot prices fell by a cumulative 2-5 RMB/tonne.
